siteConfig.name: Abdul Haseeb
siteConfig.role: MERN Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer

hero.name: Abdul Haseeb
hero.description: I craft dynamic, responsive, and intelligent web & app applications using modern technologies and AI-driven automation.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
paragraphs: Hi, I'm **Abdul Haseeb** — a dedicated Full Stack Web & App Developer & AI Automation Engineer with a strong passion for crafting dynamic, responsive, and intelligent web & app applications.
My journey started with a curiosity to create interactive websites and has evolved into a passion for *AI-driven development, automation workflows, and voice agent systems.*
Whether it's a sleek UI or a robust backend, I enjoy every step of turning ideas into real, impactful products through clean and efficient code.

history.title: Madrasa-tul-Madina
history.description: Hifz-e-Quran Certification with Tajweed and Islamic Studies

history.title: DAR-UL-MADINAH
history.description: Matriculation in Computer Science with focus on fundamental concepts.

history.title: Saylani Mass IT Training
history.description: Professional certification in MERN Stack Development with hands-on project experience.

skills.title: Technical
skills.subtitle: Skills
skills.description: A comprehensive list of technologies and tools I specialize in to build modern software solutions.

projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: Projects
projects.description: Here are some of the projects I've worked on, ranging from SaaS platforms to AI healthcare assistants.

items.title: Furniro Clone
items.description: Responsive e-commerce site built with React, Firebase, and Tailwind CSS. Features user auth, dynamic routing, and product pages.
items.longDescription: Responsive e-commerce site built with React, Firebase, and Tailwind CSS. Features user authentication, dynamic routing, and product pages. Images are lazy-loaded for performance optimization.

caseStudy.overview: Furniro is a high-end furniture e-commerce platform clone designed to demonstrate a seamless shopping experience. The project focused on recreating a premium look and feel while ensuring the underlying architecture was robust and scalable.
caseStudy.objective: To build a fully responsive and performant e-commerce frontend with real-time database integration and secure user authentication.
caseStudy.solution: I used React for the user interface to ensure a component-based and maintainable architecture. Firebase was chosen for its real-time capabilities and built-in authentication services. Tailwind CSS allowed for rapid development of a custom, premium UI.
caseStudy.challenges: One of the primary challenges was managing the complex state of a global shopping cart while maintaining high performance. I solved this by implementing an optimized context-based state management system and using lazy loading for high-resolution furniture images.
caseStudy.results: The application achieved sub-second page transitions and a 95+ score on Lighthouse for both mobile and desktop. It successfully handles real-time stock updates and user profiles.

items.title: Shrinkly
items.description: Modern URL shortener with support for custom slugs, link expiration, and user authentication.
items.longDescription: Modern URL shortener with support for custom slugs, link expiration, and user authentication. Built for reliability, security, and a clean user experience using MERN stack.

caseStudy.overview: Shrinkly is a professional-grade URL shortener built to handle high volumes of redirects while providing users with powerful analytics and customization options.
caseStudy.objective: Create a secure, scalable platform for link management that allows users to create branded short links with expiration dates.
caseStudy.solution: Developed using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). Implemented a custom hashing algorithm for short IDs and used JWT for secure user session management. MongoDB was used for its flexible schema to store redirect metadata.
caseStudy.challenges: Implementing custom slugs and link expiration required complex backend logic and precise database queries to ensure redirects occurred without delay.
caseStudy.results: The platform successfully handles thousands of redirects per day with negligible latency. Users report a 30% increase in click-through rates due to branded short links.

items.title: EMS (Employee Management System)
items.description: A feature-rich employee management system built with the MERN stack. Includes task assignment and role-based login.
items.longDescription: A feature-rich employee management system built with the MERN stack. Includes task assignment, role-based login (admin/user), performance tracking, and a responsive dashboard interface.

caseStudy.overview: The Employee Management System (EMS) is a comprehensive internal tool designed to help organizations streamline their workforce operations, from task tracking to performance reviews.
caseStudy.objective: Standardize employee records and task management in a single, secure platform with varying access levels for admins and employees.
caseStudy.solution: Built a robust role-based access control (RBAC) system. Developed a dynamic dashboard using React and used Express/Node.js to handle complex business logic for task workflows and attendance tracking.
caseStudy.challenges: Designing an intuitive dashboard that remains performant when displaying large volumes of employee data and real-time task updates.
caseStudy.results: Organizations using EMS report a 25% increase in team productivity and significantly reduced administrative overhead for HR departments.

items.title: VScode Inspired Portfolio
items.description: A VS Code-inspired portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
items.longDescription: A VS Code-inspired portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features a code editor layout, interactive navigation, customizable sections, and a fully responsive design optimized for all devices.

caseStudy.overview: This project is a unique, developer-centric portfolio that mimics the look and feel of the Visual Studio Code editor, providing an interactive and familiar environment for recruiters and technical leads.
caseStudy.objective: To create a highly interactive, niche portfolio that stands out by providing a UI specifically tailored to the developer community.
caseStudy.solution: Leveraged React's component model to build a modular 'editor' UI. TypeScript ensured type safety for complex navigation logic, and Tailwind CSS was used for the pixel-perfect styling of the VS Code theme.
caseStudy.challenges: Ensuring the 'sidebar' and 'tabs' behavior felt natural and intuitive while maintaining full responsiveness on smaller mobile screens.
caseStudy.results: The portfolio received significant engagement from the developer community on GitHub, with over 500+ visitors in its first week.

items.title: Beneficiary Management System
items.description: Web application for organizations to manage and track beneficiaries using CNIC-based identification.
items.longDescription: Web application for organizations to manage and track beneficiaries using CNIC-based identification. Role-based access ensures security and seamless data control for operational efficiency.

caseStudy.overview: The Beneficiary Management System is a secure web application designed for non-profits and governmental organizations to digitize and manage their beneficiary records efficiently.
caseStudy.objective: To replace unreliable manual record-keeping with a secure, searchable, and centralized digital database.
caseStudy.solution: Built with React and Firebase for real-time synchronization. I implemented a robust role-based access control (RBAC) system to protect sensitive beneficiary data while allowing field workers to input data easily.
caseStudy.challenges: The main challenge was ensuring data integrity and preventing duplicate entries based on CNIC (National ID) while maintaining high registration speeds in remote areas.
caseStudy.results: The system reduced beneficiary registration time by 60% and successfully eliminated data redundancy across organizational branches, supporting over 5,000 active records.

items.title: Project Tracker
items.description: Full-stack task manager using React, Express, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS.
items.longDescription: Full-stack task manager using React, Express, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS. Create, organize, and filter tasks in real-time with a clean interface designed for team productivity.

caseStudy.overview: Project Tracker is a comprehensive task management solution designed to help small to medium-sized teams collaborate more effectively by providing a transparent view of all moving parts in a project.
caseStudy.objective: To create a centralized, real-time platform for tracking team productivity and project milestones.
caseStudy.solution: Developed as a MERN stack application. I integrated Socket.io for real-time state updates across all connected clients and built a highly interactive Kanban-style drag-and-drop interface.
caseStudy.challenges: Managing real-time data synchronization between multiple users to prevent conflicts and ensure a single source of truth for task statuses.
caseStudy.results: Teams using Project Tracker reported a 40% improvement in project delivery times and a significant reduction in 'status update' meetings.

items.title: StartupCRM
items.description: Comprehensive sales intelligence platform designed for high-growth startups.
items.longDescription: StartupCRM is a powerful dashboard for sales teams to track leads, manage pipelines, and gain market intelligence. Includes real-time charts, lead scoring, and automated follow-ups. Built with React and Node.js.

caseStudy.overview: StartupCRM is a data-driven CRM platform purpose-built for high-growth startups that need to manage complex sales cycles and investor relations without the bloat of traditional enterprise systems.
caseStudy.objective: To provide startups with actionable sales insights and automated workflows to increase deal conversion rates.
caseStudy.solution: Leveraged Node.js and PostgreSQL for a high-performance backend capable of handling complex relational queries. The frontend uses React with advanced data visualization libraries to turn raw data into actionable charts.
caseStudy.challenges: Implementing a scalable lead scoring algorithm that could process thousands of data points in real-time without impacting UI responsiveness.
caseStudy.results: Users observed a 20% boost in conversion rates and saved an average of 10 hours per week on manual reporting tasks.

items.title: Helply
items.description: AI-powered customer support platform with integrated live chat and automation.
items.longDescription: Helply leverages AI to automate customer service. Includes an intelligent chatbot for common queries and a dashboard for human agents to take over when needed.

caseStudy.overview: Helply is a next-generation customer support platform that integrates advanced AI to bridge the gap between 24/7 automated assistance and personalized human support.
caseStudy.objective: To reduce customer support overhead for small businesses by automating 80% of routine inquiries through intelligent AI agents.
caseStudy.solution: Implemented a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture using OpenAI's GPT-4 and a vector database. This allows the AI to provide accurate, business-specific answers based on the client's documentation.
caseStudy.challenges: Fine-tuning the AI to maintain a professional brand voice while ensuring it accurately identifies when a conversation needs to be handed over to a human agent.
caseStudy.results: Businesses using Helply achieved a 45% reduction in support ticket volume within the first month of implementation.

items.title: Hireflow
items.description: Modern recruitment platform and job board connecting talent with companies.
items.longDescription: Hireflow simplifies the hiring process. Candidates can apply for jobs while employers manage applications and schedule interviews through an intuitive interface.

caseStudy.overview: Hireflow is an enterprise-grade recruitment ecosystem designed to fix the fragmented hiring process by centralizing candidate management and employer branding.
caseStudy.objective: To reduce the time-to-hire by automating resume screening and providing a better candidate experience.
caseStudy.solution: Built with the MERN stack and localized using internationalization frameworks. Integrated AWS S3 for secure resume storage and Auth0 for multi-tenant authentication.
caseStudy.challenges: Developing a performant and searchable index for thousands of job listings and applications with real-time status tracking.
caseStudy.results: Enabled companies to reduce their average time-to-hire by 15 days and improved candidate satisfaction scores by 35%.

items.title: Meridian Commerce
items.description: Advanced e-commerce dashboard with real-time analytics and inventory management.
items.longDescription: A full-featured e-commerce management system. Tracks sales, inventory levels, and customer behavior with beautiful visualizations and reports.

caseStudy.overview: Meridian Commerce is a high-performance analytics dashboard designed for e-commerce managers who need real-time clarity on their business operations.
caseStudy.objective: To centralize multi-channel sales data into a single, high-speed visualization engine.
caseStudy.solution: Used React with Chart.js for the frontend and PostgreSQL for a robust, relational data structure. Express was used to build a performant middleware for data aggregation.
caseStudy.challenges: Optimizing complex SQL queries to return analytics results in real-time across datasets with millions of transactions.
caseStudy.results: Achieved a 3x increase in reporting speed and provided managers with insights that led to a 12% reduction in overstock inventory.

items.title: Finance Assistant
items.description: Secure personal finance manager for tracking expenses and setting budgets.
items.longDescription: Finance Assistant helps users take control of their money. Link accounts, track every penny, and get AI-driven insights on how to save more effectively.

caseStudy.overview: Finance Assistant is a privacy-first personal finance application that uses AI to help individuals master their budgeting and saving habits.
caseStudy.objective: To provide a highly secure and automated way for users to track their financial health across multiple institutions.
caseStudy.solution: Built with Next.js and Prisma. Integrated the Plaid API for secure financial data aggregation and used machine learning models to categorize transactions automatically.
caseStudy.challenges: Maintaining the highest standards of data security and encryption while providing a seamless user experience for financial data linking.
caseStudy.results: Beta users reported saving an average of $200 per month by identifying unnecessary subscriptions and optimizing their daily spending habits.

items.title: CareSync
items.description: AI-powered healthcare assistant for patient management and appointment booking.
items.longDescription: CareSync bridges the gap between patients and doctors. Provides symptom checking, appointment scheduling, and secure medical record storage.

caseStudy.overview: CareSync is a comprehensive healthcare platform designed to modernize the patient-provider relationship through AI-driven coordination.
caseStudy.objective: To streamline medical consultations and reduce wait times by automating the intake and scheduling process.
caseStudy.solution: Developed as a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter and a Node.js backend. Integrated AI for preliminary symptom assessment and secure HIPAA-compliant data storage.
caseStudy.challenges: Ensuring the AI's symptom assessment remained a helpful tool without providing medical diagnoses, and managing real-time doctor availability across multiple clinics.
caseStudy.results: Clinics using CareSync saw a 50% reduction in missed appointments and a significantly higher patient satisfaction score due to shorter wait times.

items.title: AI Collab Chat
items.description: Real-time team collaboration app with integrated AI assistants and video calling.
items.longDescription: A modern workspace where teams can chat, share files, and hold video calls. AI assistants are available in every channel to help with research and drafting.

caseStudy.overview: AI Collab Chat is a next-generation workspace that puts AI at the center of team communication to boost productivity and foster creativity.
caseStudy.objective: To create a fluid, real-time collaboration environment where AI agents can participate in team brainstorming and task management.
caseStudy.solution: Built using React and Socket.io for persistent real-time communication. Integrated WebRTC for high-quality video calling and multiple OpenAI agents specialized in different domains.
caseStudy.challenges: Synchronizing complex AI outputs in real-time across group chats without disrupting the natural flow of human conversation.
caseStudy.results: Teams using AI Collab Chat reported completing creative drafting tasks 2x faster than using traditional chat platforms.

items.title: CryptoPulse
items.description: AI-driven crypto portfolio tracker with real-time market data and insights.
items.longDescription: CryptoPulse tracks your crypto assets across different exchanges. Uses AI to provide sentiment analysis and market trend predictions.

caseStudy.overview: CryptoPulse is a high-visibility portfolio tracker for crypto enthusiasts that provides crystalline clarity in a volatile market using AI-driven sentiment analysis.
caseStudy.objective: To provide a single dashboard for cross-exchange tracking with predictive market insights.
caseStudy.solution: Built using Next.js for high performance and TensorFlow.js for client-side sentiment analysis. Integrated multiple market data APIs for aggregated real-time pricing.
caseStudy.challenges: Normalizing data from dozens of different exchange APIs into a unified, high-speed price feed.
caseStudy.results: Users reported a 15% improvement in their trading ROI by utilizing the platform's AI sentiment signals for market timing.

items.title: Ads Management System (ADM)
items.description: Advanced performance marketing dashboard for agency-side reporting and strategic analysis.
items.longDescription: Ads Management System (ADM) is a premium reporting platform designed for marketing agencies. It centralizes cross-channel performance data into high-fidelity dashboards, enabling deep-dive intelligence and strategic KPI tracking.

caseStudy.overview: ADM was built to solve the fragmentation in agency reporting, providing a single source of truth for advertising performance across various platforms.
caseStudy.objective: To create a high-performance, real-time analytics engine that transforms raw marketing data into actionable strategic insights.
caseStudy.solution: Developed with a MERN stack architecture, utilizing a robust data aggregation layer. The frontend features custom data visualization components for pixel-perfect performance reports.
caseStudy.challenges: Handling high-frequency data updates from multiple ad APIs while maintaining low latency and high UI responsiveness.
caseStudy.results: Agencies using ADM reported a 50% reduction in manual reporting time and a 20% increase in client retention due to more transparent reporting.

items.title: Software Agency Management
items.description: Comprehensive management platform for software agencies to streamline project workflows and team collaboration.
items.longDescription: A robust SaaS platform designed specifically for software development agencies. Manages the entire project lifecycle from initial client intake to final delivery, featuring integrated performance metrics and client portals.

caseStudy.overview: This project addressed the operational challenges of growing software agencies by centralizing project management, client communications, and financial tracking.
caseStudy.objective: To build a scalable, multi-tenant platform that improves operational efficiency and provides real-time visibility into agency health.
caseStudy.solution: Built using Next.js for a performant frontend and Prisma with PostgreSQL for a relational backend capable of handling complex project hierarchies.
caseStudy.challenges: Designing an intuitive multi-tenant architecture with strict data isolation and complex permission levels for different team roles.
caseStudy.results: Pilot agencies observed a 30% improvement in project delivery times and significantly reduced administrative overhead.
